alkylation reagent: blocked with 20 mM NEM on ice for 15 min
alkylation concentration: blocked with 20 mM NEM on ice for 15 min
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin in 25 mM NH4HCO3 overnight at 37 °C
enrichment method: incubated with anti-FLAG M2 affinity gel
fractionation method: separated by nonreducing versus reducing 2-D gel
instrument: directly into an Orbitrap Exploris 480 mass spectrometer
ionization type: The eluate was electrosprayed at a 2.0 kV voltage
reduction reagent: dithiothreitol (DTT, a commonly used agent for disulfide reduction)
reduction concentration: 1 mM NAC, 1 mM VC, 200 μM DTT
